MARK_OF_PAIN.title: Mark of Pain
MARK_OF_PAIN.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, shuffle 2 Wounds into your draw pile.
CHAMPION_BELT.title: Champion Belt
CHAMPION_BELT.description: Whenever you apply Vulnerable, apply {WeakAmount} Weak.
WRIST_BLADE.title: Wrist Blade
WRIST_BLADE.description: Attacks that cost 0 deal {ExtraDamage} additional damage.
HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THE_SPECIMEN.title: The Specimen
THE_SPECIMEN.description: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any Poison it has to a random enemy.
FROZEN_CORE.title: Frozen Core
FROZEN_CORE.description: If you end your turn with any empty Orb slots, Channel 1 Frost.
INSERTER.title: Inserter
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.title: Nuclear Battery
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Plasma.
